form.formComment: 13-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 2138m. Last start won by a neck as favourite when quickly away, (Fr3) at this track (2:34.50) beating Royal Princess in 3yo+ NR up to 48 on March 31 at $2.70. Expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Solid run when a close second behind Macs A Dude at this track over 2138m in a 3yo+ NR 43 to 48 on March 17 at $1.85.
